scripts.build: tsc && npx vite build && node copy-legal-pages.js && node copy-all-assets.js && node copy-havok.js && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/.nojekyll', ''); require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/CNAME', 'swingpuzzles.com');"
scripts.deploy:prod: git checkout prod && git pull origin prod && yarn build && npx gh-pages -d dist -b gh-pages --dotfiles && git checkout main
